title: Money fundamentals
description: The foundation. Understand what money actually is before you try to manage it.

title: Risk & allocation
description: Risk is not the enemy. This track teaches you to measure it, tolerate it, and use it.

title: Asset classes
description: Every investment belongs to a category. Understanding those categories is the prerequisite for every decision that follows.

title: Portfolio construction
description: A portfolio is not a collection of investments. It is a system. This track teaches you to build one deliberately.

title: Equity & valuation
description: Buying a stock means buying a business. This track teaches you to evaluate whether the price is right.

title: Debt, credit & fixed income
description: Debt is a tool. Credit is a score. Bonds are a market. This track separates the mechanics from the mythology.

title: Derivatives & advanced instruments
description: Options, futures, and hedges are not speculation by default. This track teaches what they actually are and when they belong in your thinking.
